name: jupytermeow
description: Meow-style modal editing for JupyterLab (CodeMirror 6): NORMAL / INSERT / MOTION / KEYPAD states, selection-first commands, the char-thing table, digit expand with hints, grab / swap-grab / sync-grab, and avy jumps. The whole keymap lives in a bundled .jupytermeowrc (QWERTY by default, every key rebindable); user rc lines override it entry by entry through the Settings editor.
